title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI Mode to all US users
items.description: Canvas in AI Mode is available to U.S. users in English for creating plans, projects, apps, and more.

items.title: I Ranked 30 Energy Drinks, From Celsius to Ghost (2025)
items.description: The future is here, and it is jacked up on B vitamins, red dye, and taurine. These are the best energy drinks to get from tired to wired.

items.title: MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e, and everything else Apple announced this week
items.description: From a new iPhone to a budget-friendly MacBook, Apple announced a series of new products this week.

items.title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
items.description: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

items.title: US and EU police shut down LeakBase, a site accused of sharing stolen passwords and hacking tools

items.title: Marshall Kilburn III Review: A Classic Rock Bluetooth Speaker
items.description: Prepping for warmer weather? Marshall's midsize portable Bluetooth speaker sounds as good as it looks.
